original_image_tags: A faded, yellowed document page with extensive "bleed-through" from text on the reverse side, making the primary side difficult to read. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. The bottom third of the page contains several overlapping stamps in blue, purple, and red ink, and some handwritten annotations.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned yellow document page with faint typed text and multiple red and black rubber-stamp markings near the bottom, including a boxed stamp and tilted date-style stamps; the page has two dark punch holes at the top.*
